secciones.contenido:
Your GREENVILLE Chiropractor

Our scheduled hours are as follows:

Monday: 8:00AM-12:15PM, 2:00PM-5:00PM
Tuesday: 8:00AM-12:15PM, 2:00PM-5:00PM
Wednesday: 8:00AM-12:15PM, 2:00PM-5:00PM
Thursday: 8:00AM-12:15PM, 2:00PM-6:00PM
Friday: 8:00AM-1:00PM

Call the office to make an appointment! 616-754-9172

Greenville Chiropractic has served Greenville and surrounding area for over 50 years! Dr. Matthew DeKraker and Dr. Craig Cushman offer patients finest facility and treatment.

Dr. Matthew DeKraker and Dr. Craig Cushman are chiropractors serving GREENVILLE and the surrounding area. Our chiropractors and the rest of the welcoming team at Greenville Chiropractic are committed to providing chiropractic solutions to address your unique needs, whether you are experiencing back pain, neck pain, headaches, or even muscular tightness and tension. You may be searching for pain relief after an accident, experiencing an injury, or if you suffer from a specific condition like chronic back pain or a spinal condition. Even if you looking to improve your overall health, our chiropractors can help you attain your everyday wellness goals! Visit our testimonials page to find out what our patients are saying about our GREENVILLE chiropractor and our chiropractic care plans.

At your first visit to Greenville Chiropractic, Dr. Matthew DeKraker or Dr. Craig Cushman will explain how chiropractic works and give you a full evaluation to see if chiropractic care may benefit you. If the doctor believes chiropractic can benefit you, we will customize a plan of care for your condition and health goals.

If you have not been to a chiropractor before and want to find out more, please email us or call (616) 754-9172 to receive the answers to your questions from our experienced team. We also welcome referrals, so we invite you to share our chiropractic and wellness information with your friends and loved ones.

If you would like to stay informed about the latest in chiropractic care or if you want to start receiving free articles about health and wellness news, subscribe to our bi-weekly newsletter, even if you are not a patient. We also offer a community content area, which includes wellness articles and other healthcare resources.

secciones.contenido:
Reviews By Our Satisfied Clients

"This is a great office! I have seen both doctors and they both do a great job. I am a hygienist and they keep me working!" — Amanda S.

"This is the best in the business. I have been going here for a lot of years. Back when the office was on Benton st to current. Great staff and Awesome Doc's." — Rich R.

"I love GCC. They are so friendly and very helpful. I have been going there for years." — Victoria N.

secciones.contenido:
Interesting Health Topics

1. February Newsletter: The Benefits of Regular Chiropractic Adjustments — Could regular chiropractic adjustments improve your health and comfort?
2. January Newsletter: How an Auto Accident Impacts Your Posture and How Chiropractic Care Can Help — Chiropractic care offers the perfect solution to your post-accident posture issues.
3. November Newsletter: Chiropractic Care for Headache Relief — Struggling with headaches? Chiropractic care offers natural relief.
4. January Newsletter: Top Benefits of Combining Chiropractic Care and Physical Therapy — Struggling with pain and stiffness? The chiropractic/physical therapy combination approach may offer ideal solution.
5. February Newsletter: The Benefits of Chiropractic Care Across All Ages — Wondering if chiropractic treatments are good idea for everyone?
6. March Newsletter: How Chiropractic Care May Improve Your Stress Levels — Has stress taken control of your life? Chiropractic care could help you relax.
7. December Newsletter: How to Choose the Best Chiropractor for Your Needs — Not sure which chiropractor is right for you? Check out our search tips.
8. March Newsletter: What Disc Conditions Can a Chiropractor Help With? — Wondering if chiropractic treatment is right for your disc condition?
